languages.text: "Wie es aussieht, ist der Weg zum Lager blockiert. Irgendeine Idee, wie wir da durchkommen?"
languages.original_text: "Apparently, the passage to the camp is blocked. Any suggestions on how to get through?"

traits.locale_text: "Wie es aussieht, ist der Weg zum Lager blockiert. Irgendeine Idee, wie wir da durchkommen?"

languages.text: « Apparemment, la voie qui mène au camp est bloquée. Savez-vous comment nous pourrions nous ménager un passage ? »
languages.original_text: "Apparently, the passage to the camp is blocked. Any suggestions on how to get through?"

traits.locale_text: « Apparemment, la voie qui mène au camp est bloquée. Savez-vous comment nous pourrions nous ménager un passage ?

languages.text: “通往营地的路被堵住了。有什么办法能过去吗？”
languages.original_text: "Apparently, the passage to the camp is blocked. Any suggestions on how to get through?"

traits.locale_text: “通往营地的路被堵住了。有什么办法能过去吗？”

languages.text: «Por lo visto, el camino al campamento está bloqueado. ¿Alguna sugerencia para abrirnos paso?».
languages.original_text: "Apparently, the passage to the camp is blocked. Any suggestions on how to get through?"

traits.locale_text: «Por lo visto, el camino al campamento está bloqueado. ¿Alguna sugerencia para abrirnos paso?».

languages.text: 「どうやらキャンプへの通路が塞がれているようだ。どうすれば通れるだろうか？」
languages.original_text: "Apparently, the passage to the camp is blocked. Any suggestions on how to get through?"

traits.locale_text: 「どうやらキャンプへの通路が塞がれているようだ。どうすれば通れるだろうか？」

languages.text: "Görünüşe göre kampa giden geçit kapalı. Nasıl geçeceğimiz konusunda bir fikrin var mı?"
languages.original_text: "Apparently, the passage to the camp is blocked. Any suggestions on how to get through?"

traits.locale_text: "Görünüşe göre kampa giden geçit kapalı. Nasıl geçeceğimiz konusunda bir fikrin var mı?"
